wildlife_pack.name: feral cat-pack
wildlife_pack.flavor: Three of them in the dark, breathing wrong. Their eyes catch your light at angles cats' eyes shouldn't.
wildlife_pack.deathFlavor: The pack scatters back into the maintenance ducts. The biggest one doesn't stand up.
wildlife_pack.fleeFlavor: You back to the seal-crack before they commit. They watch you go and don't follow.

loop_drone.name: looped maintenance drone
loop_drone.flavor: A maintenance drone running pre-Crisis security routines. It does not know which century it is.
loop_drone.deathFlavor: Its servos fold. The arm-mount makes one last cycle motion against the floor and stops.
loop_drone.fleeFlavor: You back into the seal. The drone resumes its loop, three steps and a turn, three steps and a turn.

rust_swarm.name: rust-mite swarm
rust_swarm.flavor: A scrap-cloud of mites that survive on iron oxide and bad ideas. They are very small. There are very many.
rust_swarm.deathFlavor: The cloud thins, sags, settles. They are easier to kill than they are to ignore.
rust_swarm.fleeFlavor: You step out of the cloud. They don't pursue. They are already feeding on the wall.

bureau_watcher.name: Bureau watcher
bureau_watcher.flavor: Bureau-issue rain shell. Calm posture. Knows who you are because that's their job.
bureau_watcher.deathFlavor: The watcher folds slowly, the way the Bureau has trained them to fold. The rain shell stays clean.
bureau_watcher.fleeFlavor: You break contact. The watcher does not chase. The Bureau has files for what comes next.
